_meta.suite: Zorbit Platform Gate Checks — L7 Browser UI (L0-L6 via shell script)
_meta.description: Run L0-L6 first via: testing/e2e-standalone-bundle/scripts/zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh (on ARM server). L7 = browser-level UI verification via Playwright.

gate_map.L0: Docker containers, networks, port bindings — zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh
gate_map.L2: Auth & JWT structure (login, privileges array non-empty) — zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh
gate_map.L3: Kafka topics exist, consumer groups assigned with hyphened topic names — zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh
gate_map.L4: Module registry: 19 modules READY, manifests have navigation.sections — zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh
gate_map.L5: Kafka event flow E2E: publish → nav logs 'Cached nav for module' within 30s — zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh
gate_map.L6: Navigation /menu: stale=false, sections>0, expected sections present — zorbit-gate-checks-L0-L6.sh
gate_map.L7: Browser UI: sidebar shows database menu, sections visible, menuSource='database' — this file

steps.text: Gate L7 Browser UI checks starting. Prerequisite: L0 through L6 shell gates must have passed.
Login successful. Sidebar pinned. Starting L7 browser UI gate checks.

l7-sidebar-source.name: L7.1 — Sidebar menuSource = database
l7-sidebar-source.description: Verify the sidebar footer shows 'database' source, meaning the full Kafka pipeline has delivered menu data.

steps.text: L7.1: Verifying menuSource indicator shows database, not static or fallback.

steps.description: L7.1: menuSource must NOT be static
L7.1: menuSource must NOT be fallback

steps.text: L7.1 passed. menuSource is database — Kafka pipeline is delivering menu data.

l7-sidebar-sections.name: L7.2 — Sidebar Sections Visible
l7-sidebar-sections.description: All expected module sections must be visible in the sidebar: Identity, Navigation, Event Bus, Audit.

steps.text: L7.2: Checking all expected module sections visible in sidebar.
L7.2: Core module sections confirmed in sidebar.

l7-sidebar-items.name: L7.3 — Sidebar Menu Items Clickable
l7-sidebar-items.description: Click each core module section and verify the page loads without error.

steps.text: L7.3: Verifying core sidebar items are clickable and pages load.

l7-nav-api-browser.name: L7.4 — Navigation Module Registry Admin Page
l7-nav-api-browser.description: The /navigation/modules page should show all 19 registered modules pulled from the registry.

steps.text: L7.4: Checking navigation admin page shows all registered modules.

l7-auth-pages.name: L7.5 — Authorization Pages Load
l7-auth-pages.description: Roles and privileges pages must load without error.

steps.text: Gate L7 complete. All browser UI checks done.

gate-checks-l7.name: L7 Browser UI Gate
gate-checks-l7.description: Browser-level verification: sidebar source=database, sections visible, items clickable, nav admin pages load. Run AFTER L0-L6 shell gates pass.
